mapper.select: SELECT version_id AS versionId, file_id AS fileId, version, version_name AS versionName, change_log AS changeLog, file_size AS fileSize, file_md5 AS fileMd5, created_user_id AS createdUserId, created_user_name AS createdUserName, created_time AS createdTime FROM file_version WHERE file_id = #{fileId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY version DESC

SELECT COUNT(1) AS totalFiles, COALESCE(SUM(file_size), 0) AS totalSize, COUNT(DISTINCT created_user_id) AS totalUsers, SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(created_time) = CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS todayUploads, SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(created_time) = CURDATE() THEN file_size ELSE 0 END) AS todaySize FROM file_tbl_file_info WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId}
AND storage_type = #{storageType}
mapper.update: UPDATE file_tbl_file_info SET download_count = download_count + 1, last_access_time = NOW() WHERE file_id = #{fileId}
UPDATE file_tbl_file_info SET view_count = view_count + 1, last_access_time = NOW() WHERE file_id = #{fileId}

UPDATE file_tbl_file_info SET audit_status = #{auditStatus}, audit_comment = #{auditComment}, audit_user_id = #{auditUserId}, audit_user_name = #{auditUserName}, audit_time = #{auditTime}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE file_id = #{fileId}

UPDATE file_tbl_file_info SET file_status = #{status}, updated_user_id = #{updatedUserId}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE file_id IN
#{id}
